title: ERD Settings Sidebar to Declutter Toolbar
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want a Settings icon on the ERD that opens a sidebar for less frequently used controls, so that the main toolbar is simplified and I can focus on the diagram without visual clutter.
description:
The ERD top toolbar has become crowded with too many controls (view management, simplify toggle, lock toggle, user relationships toggle, etc.). To improve the UX, a Settings gear icon is added to the toolbar that toggles a sidebar panel.

The sidebar consolidates the two existing toggle buttons and provides a home for upcoming enhanced ERD features. This declutters the main toolbar while keeping all settings easily accessible. The settings sidebar also sets the stage for future sidebar-based features.
acceptance_criteria: A Settings gear icon appears in the ERD toolbar
Clicking the gear icon toggles a settings sidebar panel
The existing toggle buttons (simplify links, lock positions) are moved into the sidebar
The main toolbar is visually simplified with fewer controls
The sidebar can be toggled closed to return to the full diagram view
The sidebar serves as a container for future ERD enhancement features
ux_changes: New Settings gear icon in the ERD toolbar that opens a sidebar panel. Existing toggle controls (simplify, lock) relocated from the toolbar to the sidebar, reducing visual clutter on the main toolbar.
implementation_notes: Developer was asked to coordinate the commit with the team lead for review on dev. This sidebar serves as the foundation for future ERD features that will live in sidebar panels.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the settings sidebar and requested review. Coordination with the team lead was requested to ensure the commit was reviewed on dev before merging.
